shiftToStart(T[], int, int) - Method in class michaelryan.struct.queues.CircularArrayQueue
Moves all queue elements leftwards from an arbitrary position in a given array queue to have the tail at index 0.

Randomises the order of characters in a given string.

size() - Method in interface michaelryan.struct.queues.PriorityQueue
Returns the number of elements in this priority queue.
size() - Method in interface michaelryan.struct.queues.Queue
Returns the number of elements in this queue.
Sleeper - Class in michaelryan.background.examples
An example implementation of TaskCompleter which sleeps for the specified amount of time.
Sleeper(long) - Constructor for class michaelryan.background.examples.Sleeper
Constructs a new Sleeper with the specified number of milliseconds to sleep for.
sort(String) - Static method in class michaelryan.string.Strings
Sorts a string by its constituent char values
Stack<T> - Interface in michaelryan.struct.stacks
A last-in first-out (LIFO) data structure.
StackImpl<T> - Class in michaelryan.struct.stacks
 
StackImpl() - Constructor for class michaelryan.struct.stacks.StackImpl
Constructs a new empty stack.

Static class for manipulating strings
Strings() - Constructor for class michaelryan.string.Strings
Don't let anyone instantiate this class

Swaps the position of two nodes, given their indices.
